# Request for Father's Medical Records from 2002

## Inquiry Regarding Access to Past Health Documentation

Dear Records Administrator,

I am writing to formally request a copy of my father's medical records held at your facility. These documents date back to the year 2002. My primary purpose for this request involves a comprehensive family health review. I need specific historical data to understand long-term health patterns accurately. Please advise on the exact procedure to obtain these records.

To facilitate this request, I will need to provide the following items:
*   A completed authorization form signed by my father.
*   Proof of my relationship to the patient.
*   A valid government-issued photo identification.

I have visited [facility website](https://www.example.com) for general information but require specific guidance here. I understand there may be fees associated with retrieving such old data. Please let me know the total cost and payment methods available. I appreciate your prompt assistance with this matter.

Thank you for your time and support regarding this request.

Sincerely,

John Doe
